channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Thursday, May 07
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 06:19 PM (1.868 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 02:27 AM (-0.134 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: W 10 G 20 mph
